personal.name: Kashyap Ashara
personal.title: Technical Lead - Engineering
personal.tagline: React • TypeScript • AI Integration • Microfrontends • 8+ Years

about: Technical Lead with 8+ years of experience building scalable React applications and AI-powered solutions. Specialized in Microfrontend Architecture, Frontend Design Systems, and high-performance web applications. AI practitioner with hands-on experience integrating advanced language models like CLAUDE into development workflows. Currently leading React component library management and microfrontend integration. Passionate about clean code, developer experience, and modern frontend patterns.

experience.description: Create and maintain a comprehensive React component library integrated with a Rollup-based module federation setup
experience.longDescription: Managed the creation and maintenance of a comprehensive React component library integrated with a Rollup-based module federation setup. Designed and implemented multitenancy patterns for enterprise SaaS platform. Managed integration of React microfrontend with existing Angular applications, ensuring seamless cross-framework communication. Pioneered AI-powered development workflows using CLAUDE API for code generation, documentation, and developer assistance. Focused on developer experience, performance optimization, and design system scalability. Mentored junior developers on React best practices, microfrontend patterns, and frontend architecture principles.
achievements: Architected and implemented React component library used by 50+ developers
Reduced bundle size by 35% through code splitting and lazy loading
Integrated CLAUDE API for automated code generation and documentation
Implemented AI-powered development workflows reducing development time by 25%
Maintained component library documentation and usage guidelines
Implemented design system consistency across multiple teams
Internationalization support for multi-language applications
Implemented WCAG 2.1 compliance across all components
Mentored 5+ junior developers on frontend architecture and AI integration
Led code review standards adoption

experience.longDescription: Leading the development and maintenance of a comprehensive React component library integrated. Designed and implemented component library patterns and best practices along with team of 5+ developers.
achievements: Architected and implemented React component library used by team of 5+ developers
Reduced bundle size by 35% through code splitting and lazy loading

experience.longDescription: Developed responsive e-commerce platform frontend with React 16 and Next.js. Implemented server-side rendering for improved SEO. Built reusable component library with comprehensive documentation. Optimized performance with code splitting and image optimization.

experience.longDescription: Developed internal tools and applications for extracting frames from Adobe illustrator to use in CGI composer. Automating exporting of frames from Adobe illustrator to use in CGI composer for IVI (In-Vehicle Infotainment) systems development.

projects.title: Microfrontend Architecture And Component Library
projects.description: Module Federation setup for scalable micro frontends
projects.longDescription: Implemented a production-grade microfrontend architecture using Webpack Module Federation. Enables independent development and deployment of multiple frontend applications while sharing dependencies. Includes shared design system, routing coordination, and state management across federated modules. Powers the enterprise SaaS platform serving Fortune 500 customers.

projects.title: Armis MSSP Portal - Component Library
projects.description: Enterprise-grade React component library with Storybook documentation
projects.longDescription: Designed and built a comprehensive React component library serving the Armis MSSP Portal team. Features 100+ components with full TypeScript support, accessibility compliance, and comprehensive Storybook documentation. Implements design system tokens with Tailwind CSS. Includes automated testing, visual regression testing, and CI/CD pipeline for continuous deployment.

projects.title: LinkedIn Cloud Security - DevSecOps Platform
projects.description: Linkedin Cloud Security is a DevSecOps project where we create, manage and monitor policies and the security of cloud infrastructure using Azure Portal and Azure DevOps.
projects.longDescription: To manage the security of cloud infrastructure, we created, managed and monitored policies using Azure Portal and Azure DevOps. Automate policy creation and monitoring using Azure DevOps pipelines. Built dashboards to visualize security metrics and trends. Policy Exemption management and approval workflows.

projects.title: Sophos Kaseya VSA
projects.description: Sophos Kaseya VSA is a platform for managing and monitoring Kaseya VSA environments for Sophos assets.
projects.longDescription: Sophos Kaseya VSA is a platform for managing and monitoring Kaseya VSA environments for Sophos assets. Built a comprehensive React application with ReatJs, Bootstrap, Python backend. Includes dashboards, policy management, and monitoring capabilities.
